name: Navy Federal Visa Signature Flagship Rewards

welcome_offer.description: 35,000 bonus points ($350 value) when you spend $3,500 within 90 days of account opening. Expires Jun 30, 2026.

earning_rates.notes: Including airlines, hotels, car rentals, cruise lines, campgrounds, RV parks, ride-sharing, parking, tolls, ferries, museums, amusement parks, golf courses

annual_credits.name: Amazon Prime Annual Membership
annual_credits.description: Statement credit for Amazon Prime annual membership fee charged to the card. Limit one per year.

annual_credits.name: Global Entry / TSA PreCheck
annual_credits.description: Up to $120 statement credit for Global Entry or TSA PreCheck application fees.

other_benefits.name: Worldwide Automatic Travel Accident Insurance
other_benefits.description: Up to $250,000 coverage for bodily injury/loss on covered trips when common carrier fare is charged to the card.

other_benefits.name: Collision Damage Waiver
other_benefits.description: Secondary CDW coverage when renting a car for 15 days or less.

other_benefits.name: Travel and Emergency Assistance
other_benefits.description: Medical referral, lost luggage locator, prescription assistance available 24/7.
